sentences.english: What do you think is the most important invention in human history?
sentences.korean: 인류 역사상 가장 중요한 발명이 무엇이라 생각합니까?

sentences.english: I believe the most important invention in history is the internet.
sentences.korean: 역사상 가장 중요한 발명은 인터넷이라고 생각해요.

sentences.english: First it has democratized access to information — anyone with a connection can learn virtually anything for free.
sentences.korean: 첫째 정보 접근을 민주화했어요 — 연결만 있으면 누구나 사실상 무엇이든 무료로 배울 수 있어요.

sentences.english: Second it has transformed how businesses operate enabling global commerce and remote work.
sentences.korean: 둘째 기업 운영 방식을 변화시켜 글로벌 상거래와 원격 근무를 가능하게 했어요.

sentences.english: Third it has connected billions of people across borders allowing ideas and cultures to spread faster than ever before.
sentences.korean: 셋째 국경을 넘어 수십억 명을 연결하여 아이디어와 문화가 그 어느 때보다 빠르게 퍼지게 했어요.

sentences.english: No other invention has changed so many aspects of daily life in such a short period of time.
sentences.korean: 이렇게 짧은 시간에 일상의 이렇게 많은 측면을 바꾼 발명은 없어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Attending a Large vs. Small School
A Festival or Event You Attended
